Here's today's feedback about the baby plan:

feedback Baby absolutely loved tummy time today! She was so engaged and held her head up for almost a minute. Really impressive progress.

journal Had a wonderful morning session with lots of smiles and cooing. Baby was very alert and responsive during reading time.

feedback Baby enjoyed the sensory play activities but seemed a bit overwhelmed when we tried the music time - maybe too stimulating for her age.

journal Afternoon was challenging with some fussiness around 4 PM, but she settled down well for the evening routine.
